info.name: World of Shadows API
info.description: Complete API collection for World of Shadows backend. Includes authentication, news, forum, users, roles, and more.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "New Article Title",
  "slug": "new-article-title",
  "content": "Article content here",
  "summary": "Brief summary",
  "category": "news",
  "cover_image": "https://example.com/image.jpg",
  "is_published": false
}

request.description: List threads in a category (paginated). Response: { items: [...], total, page, per_page }. Thread objects include author_username, bookmarked_by_me (bool), and tags (array). Moderators/admins also see hidden and archived threads. Query: page (default 1), limit (default 20, max 100).

response.name: 200 OK – thread list with tags and bookmark state

query.description: Filter by status: open, reviewed, escalated, resolved, dismissed. Omit for all.
Filter by target type: thread or post (leave blank for all)

request.description: List forum reports. Requires moderator or admin role. Filter by `status` (open, reviewed, escalated, resolved, dismissed) and `target_type` (thread or post). Supports `page` and `limit` for pagination. Response: { items, total, page, limit }. Each report object contains `id`, `target_type`, `target_id`, `reported_by`, `reason`, `status`, `handled_by`, `handled_at`, `created_at`, `resolution_note`.
Update the status of a single report (moderator/admin only). Valid statuses: open, reviewed, escalated, resolved, dismissed. resolution_note is optional free-text stored with the report.
Bulk update status for multiple reports (moderator/admin only). Valid statuses for bulk: reviewed, escalated, resolved, dismissed. resolution_note is optional and applied to all updated reports.

query.description: Optional search term to filter tags by label/slug

request.description: List all forum tags with thread counts. Requires moderator or admin role. Returns paginated results with `id`, `slug`, `label`, `thread_count`, `created_at`.
Delete a forum tag by ID. Requires admin role. Returns 409 if the tag is currently associated with any threads. Returns 200 on success.

response.name: 409 Conflict – tag in use
